name: UPND: Door-to-Door Roster Clean-up
objective: Verify voter details and household support in Kalingalinga North.
mainMessage: UPND: A government that listens. We are checking in to ensure your community needs are being met.
talkingPoints: Education: Verify your children are benefiting from the free education policy.
Health: Updates on the local clinic expansion.
Infrastructure: Discussing the new drainage projects in your ward.

questions.prompt: Are you aware of the free education policy?

name: UPND: Village Mobilization Drive
objective: Cluster-based engagement with community leaders and villagers.
mainMessage: Community Unity: Moving Zambia forward village by village.
talkingPoints: FISP: Fertilizer and seed distribution updates.
Boreholes: Clean water access projects for the village.

name: UPND: Lusaka Mega-Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming branch meetings and policy successes.
mainMessage: Join us this Saturday at 10 AM for the UNZA Youth Branch meeting. Progress through unity!

name: UPND Victory 2026 Mobilization
objective: Mobilize support and announce final manifesto points at major venues.
mainMessage: Uniting for Victory: Securing Zambia's future through development and transparency.
talkingPoints: Youth Employment: Launch of the National Internship Scheme.
